title: China rare earth export ban — 90 days
historical_analogue: 2010 China rare earth export quota cuts (price surge 700%), 2023 gallium/germanium ban
description: China bans exports of 17 rare earth elements for 90 days as geopolitical leverage. China controls 60%+ of mining and 85% of processing. Wind turbines, EV motors, F-35 components, and MRI machines face immediate supply chain collapse.
